title: eriosema flexuosum
intro: Eriosema flexuosum, also known as the 'twisted pea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its leaves, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Eriosema flexuosum has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as its potential to treat gastrointestinal problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the leaves of Eriosema flexuosum are often prepared as a tea or decoction for its therapeutic benefits.
